message:
test(storage): add comprehensive blocked cache correctness tests

15 tests covering blocked_issues_cache rebuild correctness:
- Reopen blocker re-blocks dependent
- Chain dependencies (A→B→C) block downstream
- Multiple blockers with partial close
- Mixed dependency types (blocks/conditional-blocks/waits-for)
- Closing blocked issue removes from cache
- Delete blocker unblocks dependent
- Remove all dependencies clears cache
- Parent-child transitive blocking
- Remove parent unblocks child
- Ready/blocked sets are disjoint
- is_blocked matches get_blocked_ids
- Blocker metadata format verification
- In-progress blocker still blocks
- Force rebuild matches auto-rebuild
- Deep parent-child chain blocking (4 levels)

Closes beads_rust-1kaf

Co-Authored-By: Claude <noreply@anthropic.com>
